channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Uplift: The American Dream
item.description: Celebrating the U.S. ahead of its 250th anniversary with stories about American heroes and pastimes, including the founder of e.l.f. Cosmetics.

item.title: 9 dead, 60 hurt in 9 different mass shootings across US
item.description: At least nine mass shootings over the weekend left eight dead and at least 60 wounded, according to authorities.

item.title: Man stabs tourists near the Acropolis in Athens, Greece
item.description: A man stabbed and injured two tourists near the ancient Acropolis, Greece's top tourist attraction.

item.title: U.S. carries out 10th night of strikes on Iran after 3 U.S. troops killed
item.description: Three U.S. service members were killed over the weekend in Iraq and Jordan following Iranian attacks on a U.S. base.
